project_type: React 19 + Vite 7 + TailwindCSS 4 frontend (pnpm monorepo) with Django 5.2 backend
build_system: pnpm monorepo with workspace packages. Root vitest for smoke tests. artifacts/edms has its own vitest.config.ts for feature tests.
test_framework: Vitest with jsdom environment, @testing-library/react. Tests co-located with source (*.test.ts). Setup file at artifacts/edms/src/test/setup.ts provides localStorage and matchMedia mocks.
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local && npx tsc --noEmit && cd artifacts/edms && npx vite build
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local && npx vitest run && cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local/artifacts/edms && npx vitest run
verification_instructions: 1. npx tsc --noEmit (0 errors). 2. npx vitest run (5 root smoke tests pass). 3. cd artifacts/edms && npx vitest run (all feature tests pass, ignoring 2 pre-existing ThemeContext/useOverloadProtection failures).
setup_instructions: pnpm install (already done). No additional setup needed.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install new packages. Must use existing deps only. No Docker daemon. No external HTTP calls.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. Zero TS errors. All new tests pass. Files under 800 lines. No hardcoded Tailwind colors. All work is ADDITIVE (new files only, no modification to existing code).
key_patterns: Lib modules are pure utility functions with JSDoc comments and section dividers (horizontal rules like // --- Types ---). Services use localStorage-backed mock data with typed interfaces. Tests use describe/it/expect from Vitest with beforeEach for setup. Feature flags gate new functionality via isFeatureEnabled(). Existing feature flags include AUDIT_HASH_CHAIN and STORAGE_TIERING which are relevant to Phase 10 and 12.
directory_structure: Root: monorepo. artifacts/edms/src/lib/ = pure utilities (*.ts + *.test.ts co-located). artifacts/edms/src/services/ = service classes. artifacts/edms/src/hooks/ = React hooks. config/ = YAML config files. docs/ = documentation. New security/reliability/storage utilities go in artifacts/edms/src/lib/. Makefile goes at repo root. Docs go in docs/.
